steps.title: Use the context clues
steps.content: The fossil can help researchers understand steps in hominid evolution and illuminate the Pleistocene epoch. The blank therefore needs a verb meaning detect, recognize, or figure out information from evidence.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content: A would mean using the evolutionary steps for advantage, not learning about them. C would mean ranking them. D would mean producing the steps, which researchers do not do. The word needed is the one meaning recognize or detect. The answer is B.
